title: Loft
description: Loft: A free-form surface defined by a series of cross sectional Curves. The surface provides a continuous interpolation passing through each Curve in order.

Curves.description: An ordered list of Curves defining the varying cross sectional surface profile.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
